description: Verified header links blog/portfolio/videos/contact on mobile; found a typo in the 'contact' link pointing to '/contcat' leading to a 404 error page.

issues.name: Contact link typo in header (/contcat instead of /contact)
issues.description: Expected: The contact link in the header should navigate to /contact. Actual: The contact link in the header navigates to /contcat, which results in a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Click the "contact" link in the header
Observe that the URL is /contcat and a 404 error page is displayed
issues.expectedBehavior: The contact link in the header should navigate to /contact.
issues.actualBehavior: The contact link in the header navigates to /contcat, which results in a 404 error page.
